domains.name: Client Onboarding & Management
domains.what_it_is: End-to-end workflow to bring a new FQHC live on Meridian — create org, promote to client, upload CFA/BAA, configure credentialing requirements.
dependencies: → Contracts & Documents (CFA/BAA upload uses document storage)
→ Provider Lifecycle (credentialing config references provider types)

domains.name: Provider Lifecycle & Credentialing
domains.what_it_is: Track behavioral health providers through onboarding → credentialing → active → off-boarded.
domains.who_uses_it: Legara admin, operations staff, PRO (for their assigned providers).
dependencies: → Scheduling (providers need schedules after credentialing)
→ Operations & Teams (providers get assigned to PSR teams)
→ Financial & ERP (ERP sync brings provider employment data)
domains.state: Stable — Tier 1 overhaul shipped Session 84 (PR #148 + hotfixes e4e2beb + eb86450).

domains.name: Operations & Team Management
domains.what_it_is: Operations Command Center, PSR team creation, member/provider assignment, team detail views.
dependencies: → Scheduling (team setup feeds into schedule creation)
→ Provider Lifecycle (assign provider to team requires active provider)
→ Telehealth (PSR teams serve telehealth sessions)

domains.name: Scheduling & Provider Availability
domains.what_it_is: Weekly shift templates, effective dates, time-off requests, schedule change request state machine (pending → PRO approved → locked), capacity monitoring, enc/hr tracking.
domains.who_uses_it: PRO (schedule approval, capacity oversight), PSR (team schedule view), Operations (admin overview), Providers (own schedule).
dependencies: ← Operations & Teams (team setup triggers schedule creation)
→ Telehealth (provider availability determines session routing)
→ Analytics (enc/hr feeds capacity reporting)

domains.name: Telehealth (Session Management + Encounter Execution)
domains.what_it_is: The full telehealth pipeline: PSR creates visit → patient enters waiting room → provider joins video/phone call → ambient AI notes → post-call documentation.
domains.who_uses_it: PSR (session creation, patient rooming), Provider (join call, clinical notes), Patient (waiting room, video).
dependencies: ← Operations & Teams (PSR teams serve sessions)
← Scheduling (provider availability determines routing)
→ Analytics (session data feeds utilization dashboards)
→ Financial & ERP (encounters generate billable events)

domains.name: Financial Management & ERP
domains.what_it_is: ERP data ingestion from Fidare (encounter + earnings data), provider weekly settlements, client invoicing, cost-per-encounter metrics, nightly reconciliation jobs.
domains.who_uses_it: Admin, Operations, PRO (view-only), Client (invoices via client portal).
dependencies: ← Telehealth (encounters generate billable events)
→ Analytics (financial data feeds reporting dashboards)
→ Client Onboarding (client config determines rate structure)

domains.name: Analytics & Reporting
domains.what_it_is: Utilization dashboards (visits/hr, provider productivity), anomaly detection, trend alerts, no-show analysis, financial rollups, monthly/quarterly reports.
domains.who_uses_it: Admin, Operations, PRO (client-scoped), Client (limited utilization view).
dependencies: ← Financial & ERP (encounter + earnings data feeds dashboards)
← Telehealth (session data feeds utilization metrics)
← Scheduling (scheduled hours feed capacity calculations)

domains.name: Contracts & Document Management
domains.what_it_is: Document upload/storage (S3 presigned URLs), DocuSign envelope lifecycle, primary signer management, document access control with subcategory-aware RBAC.
dependencies: ← Client Onboarding (CFA/BAA upload is part of onboarding flow)
→ Provider Lifecycle (credential documents reference this storage layer)

domains.name: CRM & Outreach
domains.what_it_is: Full CRM module for prospect management, sales pipeline, multi-user email (OAuth2 per-user Outlook), commission tracking, ABM outreach engine.
dependencies: → Client Onboarding (won deals become client onboarding)
→ Platform Infrastructure (OAuth2 tokens encrypted via AES-256-GCM, `requireModule` access control)
External: Azure AD (delegated + application permissions), Microsoft Graph API (per-user mailbox)

domains.name: Platform Infrastructure
domains.what_it_is: The cross-cutting technical foundation: RBAC matrix, view-scoping, authentication, CI/CD gates, database migrations, EJS partials, error handling, test infrastructure.
dependencies: Every domain depends on this. Changes here propagate everywhere.
domains.state: Stable (Session 83 — MFA + error monitoring + rate limiting + feature flags + contextual action evaluator).

domains.name: Content & Marketing
domains.what_it_is: Blog, LinkedIn social, email campaigns, assessment page, ad buys, event sponsorships.
domains.state: **Separate project.** Lives in `sys/marketing-queue.md` with its own agents (outreach-agent, content-agent, ads-events-agent).

domains.name: Patient Records & Scheduling
domains.what_it_is: Durable patient record database + PSR daily schedule input workflow.
domains.who_uses_it: PSRs (primary — daily schedule input, patient data maintenance), Providers (view their assigned patients + schedule), PROs (visibility into patient coordination).
dependencies: → Telehealth (scheduled visits create telehealth sessions at appointment time)
→ People / Chat / Social (patient_id auto-tag for PHI chat messages in S3)
→ Client Onboarding (patients belong to a client; client must be active)
External: Twilio (SMS invites — blocked on BAA), FQHC EHRs (one-way manual entry for now, FHIR integration future)
domains.state: **Sprint S1 Patient Records CLOSED — all 7 phases shipped (Session 94, 2026-04-22).** Meridian PR #161 (server-side, `891aaa4`) + legara-portals PR #55 (UI + P008 role-cleanup folded in, `6862b2b`) shipped P009 / S1.7 — patient SMS invites via Twilio, test-mode-first per Action Q

domains.name: People / Directory / Chat / Social
domains.what_it_is: Unified "People" layer combining employee directory, profile pages, and embedded messaging.
domains.who_uses_it: All authenticated Meridian users — admin, PRO, PSR, providers, (future) clients.
dependencies: ← Patient Records (patient_id anchor for PHI channels — S1 shipped)
→ Platform Infrastructure (auth, RBAC, session management)
External: Rocket.Chat (S4), potentially SMS/push notifications (shared with S1 Twilio)
domains.state: **S3.1 SHIPPED Session 97** — DM UX live on top of the S3.0 primitives + cross-app Message button from people-directory.
